stages.task: Scrape 4 signal sources in parallel: job boards for ICP-matching hires, Crunchbase/SEC for funding events, BuiltWith for tech stack changes, Reddit for pain point threads
Dedupe across sources, extract decision-maker emails via Hunter.io free tier / custom scraping, score intent 1-10 based on signal recency and relevance
Generate hyper-personalized first lines using claude -p referencing the specific trigger event (their hire, their funding, their tech change)
Send via warmed SMTP (custom Python smtplib, NOT Instantly), log to LEDGER/OUTREACH_PIPELINE.csv, schedule follow-ups at day 3 and day 7
